subject: Request: 15 minutes on your infra hiring
body: Hi there, you closed a series_b round on 2026-01-05 and open roles moved from 4 to 6. We support managed infra engineering teams with explicit capacity confirmation before commitment. If useful, I can share two rollout patterns in 15 minutes. Ref pro-094-orrin.
